input_files.docs/evoagent.md: EvoAgent is an open-source agent framework. It supports DeepSeek, OpenAI, and custom models. It provides tools, memory, and multi-agent capabilities.

input_files.docs/deepseek.md: Set the DEEPSEEK_API_KEY environment variable to your DeepSeek API key. The base URL defaults to https://api.deepseek.com/v1.

input_files.docs/tools.md: EvoAgent provides: read_file, write_file, edit_file, list_directory, grep, bash, python, git_status, git_diff. All tools return standardized ToolResult.

input_files.docs/memory.md: EvoAgent has a 5-layer memory: working, episodic, semantic, procedural, and reflection. Memories are stored in SQLite and support keyword/hybrid retrieval.

input_files.docs/sandbox.md: EvoAgent supports review, auto, and yolo permission modes. Default deny rules block rm -rf, sudo, shutdown, and curl pipe bash.

input_files.docs/models.md: ModelRouter routes LLM calls to different providers based on role: planner, executor, critic, summarizer, and default. Each role can use different models.

instruction: How do I run code agent?

input_files.docs/code_agent.md: Use CodeAgent(workspace).run(task) to fix bugs. It scans repos, searches code, applies patches, runs tests, and iterates until tests pass.

input_files.docs/retrieval.md: Hybrid retrieval combines keyword search with vector similarity. alpha=0.5 weights them equally. Use MockEmbeddingModel for testing without API keys.

input_files.docs/multi_agent.md: EvoAgent supports Pipeline, Debate, and Supervisor protocols. Pipeline runs agents sequentially, Debate collects proposals and judges, Supervisor distributes tasks.

input_files.docs/evaluation.md: Use evoagent eval --suite benchmarks/tool_use/tasks.jsonl --mock to run benchmarks. Results include success_rate, avg_steps, and other metrics.
